headline: Will Targa’s New LNG-Focused Director and 2026 Dividend Shape TRGP’s Capital Allocation Narrative?
summary: Targa Resources Corp. recently announced that its board appointed former ConocoPhillips executive Thomas Mathiasmeier as a Class II Director and Audit Committee member, while also declaring a second-quarter 2026 cash dividend of US$1.25 per common share, or US$5.00 per share on an annualized basis, payable on August 14, 2026. The combination of adding a director with extensive global gas and LNG experience and sustaining a sizeable dividend highlights Targa’s emphasis on governance, risk...

The combination of adding a director with extensive global gas and LNG experience and sustaining a sizeable dividend highlights Targa’s emphasis on governance, risk...

headline: ExxonMobil and Oil Stocks Rise After Rubio Says Iran ‘Not Serious’ About Talks
summary: Renewed U.S. strikes on Iran have sent oil prices higher on Wednesday, with shares in energy companies like ExxonMobil gaining as Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Iran was “not serious” about peace talks.

raw.headline: ExxonMobil and Oil Stocks Rise After Rubio Says Iran ‘Not Serious’ About Talks
